name: bizbrain-os
description: The context layer that teaches AI your business. Persistent knowledge brain that compounds context across every Claude Code session.

agents.name: brain-orchestrator
agents.description: Conducts all brain agents — event queue processing, staging validation, changelog, pattern learning

agents.name: brain-learner
agents.description: Captures learnings across sessions — decisions, action items, project status, session summaries

agents.name: entity-watchdog
agents.description: Monitors conversations for entity mentions and automatically maintains brain records

agents.name: brain-gateway
agents.description: Full brain access from any directory — entities, projects, knowledge, todos, intake

agents.name: schema-evolution
agents.description: Watches for patterns indicating new record types are needed and auto-creates them

skills.name: document-session
skills.description: Comprehensive session documentation — captures reasoning, decisions, architecture, and implementation details for important sessions
